recipe: Vegetable Fried Rice: 1. Heat oil 2. Add vegetables 3. Add cooked rice 4. Stir fry
agriculture_use: Vegetable peels can be composted to enrich soil
safety_tip: Store in fridge and eat within 24 hours

recipe: Bread Pudding: 1. Mix bread and milk 2. Add sugar 3. Bake
agriculture_use: Bread crumbs can be fed to poultry

recipe: Banana Smoothie: 1. Blend banana and milk 2. Add honey
agriculture_use: Banana peels are good compost material

recipe: Potato Curry: 1. Boil potatoes 2. Add spices and vegetables
safety_tip: Store in fridge and use within 24 hours

recipe: Egg Fried Rice: 1. Fry egg 2. Add cooked rice 3. Add soy sauce
agriculture_use: Egg shells are useful for soil calcium
